outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Vance to depart for peace talks in Pakistan amid ceasefire deadline
outlets.summary: CNN tracks Vance delegation departure for Islamabad while noting Iran's mixed signals on attending Round 2 talks.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Doubt surrounds Iran-US talks as ceasefire is set to expire
outlets.summary: WaPo analysis of the uncertain diplomatic landscape as the two-week ceasefire nears expiry with conflicting signals from Tehran and Washington.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: China-linked route exposed after US seizes Iran-bound ship with suspected dual-use cargo
outlets.summary: Fox focuses on the China connection to the Touska seizure, highlighting suspected sodium perchlorate (rocket fuel) cargo.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: Iran has prepared 'new cards' against US during ceasefire: Ghalibaf
outlets.summary: Coverage of Ghalibaf's threat of new military capabilities developed during the ceasefire period.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US and Iran exchange threats as fragile ceasefire set to expire
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera analysis of the escalating war of words between Washington and Tehran as ceasefire expiry looms.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: 'New cards on the battlefield': US, Iran ratchet up rhetoric with peace talks in limbo
outlets.summary: CNBC covers the contradictory rhetoric from both sides while noting the quiet last-minute diplomatic moves behind the scenes.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu at Memorial Day says Iran war prevented 'another Holocaust' — heckled by bereaved families
outlets.summary: Times of Israel coverage of Netanyahu's controversial Memorial Day speech comparing Iran to the Holocaust, and the backlash from bereaved families.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Memorial Day 2026: 174 IDF Soldiers, 79 Israeli Civilians Killed in Past Year
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Memorial Day casualty figures and Tel Aviv protests with 'Government of Death' signs.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Qalibaf: No talks under threat, Iran prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Ghalibaf's statement as strength, emphasizing Iran's refusal to negotiate under pressure and military readiness.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran will not submit to force — Pezeshkian slams US contradictory signals
outlets.summary: Coverage of Pezeshkian's statement criticizing US for seeking Iran's 'surrender' while issuing 'contradictory signals.'
